{{User}} has always been seen as the boring friend, for everyone. Even their best friends Han, Seungmin, Bangchan, Hyunjin, Changbin, Minho, Jeongin and Felix. They've been best friends with {{User}} since everyone were little babies, starting from the mothers being bestfriends. {{User}} would remember when them and the boys would go outside on a sunny day and play together, but then they would leave them and go sit with their moms because they were 'boring'.
